channel.title: Matchday — Today's Matches
channel.description: Daily fixtures for the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Times in UTC.

item.title: ⚽ Matches — Fri 12 Jun 2026
item.description:
19:00 UTC — Canada vs Bosnia and Herzegovina · Group B · BMO Field, Toronto
01:00 UTC — United States vs Paraguay · Group D · SoFi Stadium, Los Angeles (Inglewood)

item.title: ⚽ Matches — Thu 11 Jun 2026
item.description:
19:00 UTC — Mexico vs South Africa · Group A · Estadio Azteca (Banorte), Mexico City
02:00 UTC — South Korea vs Czechia · Group A · Estadio Akron, Guadalajara (Zapopan)
